skills.name: Gohei
skills.description: Swings a Gohei made of a wooden stick and white paper. Removes removable debuffs of an ally and buffs from the enemy. Magic damage received is decreased by the [Mental Recovery] buff when removing debuffs of allies and Magic damage received by enemy increases by the [Mental Breakdown] applied to the enemy when enemy debuff is removed. SP consumption increases proportionally to the number of buffs removed when removing enemy buffs with Gohei during PVP.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2 times
Remove 1~3 enemy buff
Remove 1~5 ally debuff
[Mental Breakdown] Increases Magic damage received by [Number of buff removed x 10]%
[Mental Recovery] Decreases Magic damage received by [Number of debuff removed x 10]%
[Gohei: Overload] Increases SP consumption by 100% per stack during PVP
[Gohei: Overload] Duration: 25 seconds

skills.name: Sweeping
skills.description: Sweeps the floor with a purified, divine broom. The swept area maintains for a period of time and the skill level of the magic circle used is the area is increased by 2. Becomes immune to removable debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Max. Sweeping Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Magic Circle Duration: CaptionRatio seconds

skills.name: Hamaya
skills.description: Hold an arrow in your hand and throw it to a designated location. Inflicts a great amount of damage against devil-type enemy. Holy-property damage is dealt to enemies nearby the location where the arrow landed. Critical chance resistance of target hit decreases.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per second
Maximum Targets: CaptionRatio3
Critical Resistance - CaptionRatio %
Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds

skills.name: Clap
skills.description: Clap your hands twice. Increases damage of the allies nearby yourself.
skills.effect_text:
Damage + CaptionRatio2 %
Duration of Damage increase effect: 10 seconds

skills.name: Kagura
skills.description: Dance to bless allies around you.
skills.effect_text:
Increase Damage by CaptionRatio % ~ CaptionRatio2 %
[Kagura: Ken] Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per second
[Kagura: Ken] targets: CaptionRatio3
[Kagura: Ken] Channeling Time: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Omikuji
skills.description: Cast lots and apply buff according to it. [Great Blessing: Honor], [Great Blessing: Hope], [Great Blessing: Safety], [Great Blessing: Health] and their corresponding chances are 25%. .
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
[Great Blessing: Honor] : Physical, Magic attack + CaptionRatio %
[Great Blessing: Hope] : Block Penetration, Accuracy, Critical Rate + CaptionRatio2 %
[Great Blessing: Safety] : Block, Evasion, Critical Resistance + CaptionRatio2 %
[Great Blessing: Health] : Physical, Magic damage received - CaptionRatio3 %

attributes.name: Gohei: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Gohei] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hamaya: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hamaya] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Omikuji: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Duration of [Omikuji] increases by 0.5% per attribute level(except Financial Fortune buff)

* Additional 10% increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Kagura: Nightingale Dance
attributes.description:
* Decreases the critical resistance of enemies within [Kagura]'s range by 3% per attribute level. Ignores enemy Defense by [3 + attribute level * 1]% when allies under the effects of [Kagura] attacks this enemies

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: [Arts] Gohei: O-Gohei
attributes.description: * Increases SP consumption of [Gohei] by +100% and removes the buffs from all enemies within 100 range.

attributes.name: [Arts] Omikuji: Financial Fortune
attributes.description:
* Adds Financial Fortune to [Omikuji] (The draw chance changes to 20%).

* Duration of Financial Fortune: 30 minutes

* Financial Fortune: Looting Chance increases by 500

* Additionally applies [Great Blessing: Lucky Draw] buff that prevents the durability of equipped equipment

* Buff related to Omikuji is removed when turning OFF the attribute.

attributes.name: [Arts] Gohei: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Gohei] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hamaya: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Hamaya] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hamaya: Heal
attributes.description:
* Removes attack function of [Hamaya], recovers the HP of party member on the magic circle by 5% of the maximum HP per 0.5 seconds

* Duration: 2 seconds

attributes.name: Kagura: Ken Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Kagura: Ken] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Kagura: Ken Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Kagura: Ken] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Kagura: Ken
attributes.description:
* Remove the original function of [Kagura] skill

* Damage the enemy in target per second during the channeling duration of [Kagura]

* When the [Kagura] skill ends, damage proportionally to the channeling duration will be applied
